pi_items.source: Google Play Store (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ds.avare), F-Droid (https://f-droid.org/en/packages/com.ds.avare/), and GitHub repository (https://github.com/apps4av/avare)

Official Avare help documentation (https://www.apps4av.com/help.html and https://raw.githubusercontent.com/apps4av/avare/master/app/src/main/assets/help.html) which states 'PFD shows a glass cockpit-like setup for learning purposes.'
Official Avare help documentation (https://www.apps4av.com/help.html) which states 'Map is the default screen in Avare'

privileged_info_summary: The Avare aviation GPS app (package: com.ds.avare) is a real, open-source Android application available on Google Play Store with 100,000+ installations. The app has been in development since 2012 and is actively maintained on GitHub. The task correctly identifies the app package as com.ds.avare and the UI element names as 'PFD' (Primary Flight Display tab showing glass cockpit-like instruments) and 'Map' (default moving map/chart view tab). Both tab names are confirmed in official Avare documentation.
